178 
SR_SPLMTL_MH_1_2_SUM 
LABEL: 
Supplemental HRSN Mental Health Sum of SR_SPLMTL_MH_1_CD and SR_SPLMTL_MH_2_CD 
DESCRIPTION: Screening result (SR) Supplemental health related social need (HRSN) mental health sum of 
SR_SPLMTL_MH_1_CD and SR_SPLMTL_MH_2_CD. 
LONG NAME: SR_SPLMTL_MH_1_2_SUM 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
AHC data system (derived) 
VALUES: 
0–6, or 
Null/Missing
